title: Comprehensive Statistical Analysis of Iteration 2 Results: Friedman/Nemenyi, Effect Sizes, Frustration Correlation, Subsampling Impact
summary: Demonstrates a comprehensive statistical analysis pipeline for comparing tree-based methods (axis-aligned, random-oblique, signed-spectral FIGS) across 3 benchmark datasets. The notebook loads pre-computed experiment results from mini_demo_data.json (36 aggregated performance records, 4 synthetic variants, 6 subsampling stability points) and runs 9 analysis sections: Friedman/Nemenyi ranking tests, Cohen's d effect sizes, Bayesian signed-rank with bootstrap ROPE (10000 iterations), frustration-accuracy Spearman correlation with power analysis, subsampling noise-floor exponential decay model, interpretability Wilcoxon tests, California housing regression anomaly diagnosis, synthetic recovery method ranking, and success criteria evaluation. Produces a 4-panel visualization dashboard and summary table.
